# customerconnect_location (Resource)

Manages a NetFoundry Location.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `customer_id` (String) Customer this location belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `name` (String) Name of the location.

### Optional

- `address` (String) Street address of the location.
- `cloud_provider` (String) Cloud provider hosting this virtual location.
- `cloud_region` (String) Region of the cloud provider.
- `description` (String) Description of the location.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the location is enabled. Defaults to true on creation.
- `latitude` (Number) Latitude in decimal degrees.
- `longitude` (Number) Longitude in decimal degrees.
- `virtual` (Boolean) Whether this is a virtual location with no physical presence.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when this location was created.
- `created_by` (String) Identity that created this location.
- `deleted` (Boolean) Whether this location has been deleted.
- `deleted_at` (String) Timestamp when this location was deleted.
- `deleted_by` (String) Identity that deleted this location.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the location.
- `owner_identity_id` (String) Identity that owns this location.
- `provider_id` (String) Provider this location belongs to.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when this location was last updated.
